headings: CONDITIONAL WAIVER AND RELEASE OF LIEN UPON FINAL PAYMENT
text: Pursuant to its Supply Agreement with ('Subcontractor'), a subcontractor to GS Construction Mountain, LLC ('Contractor'), and in consideration of the final payment in the amount of $ , Supplier hereby conditionally waives and releases its lien and right to claim a lien for labor, services, or materials furnished to ('Subcontractor') for incorporation into GSC Birchway Commerce City (the 'Project') ('Owner') being constructed on the following real
